### Research & Notes
- Notes, synthesis, and saved ideas go in research/. When writing, read recent notes first to calibrate voice and context.

### Literature & Citations
- Source material lives in research/sources/; citation-ready notes in research/Literature Notes.md (APA).
- When citing, pull the exact source note rather than paraphrasing from memory.
<!-- noesis:modules:end -->
